allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', p.get\('main'\)\); print\('exports:', list\(p.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('frontend/public/graph-data.json'\)\); sc=[n for n in d['nodes'] if n['nodeType']=='SupplyChain']; fi=[e for e in d['edges'] if e['relType']=='FEEDS_INTO']; cm=[e for e in d['edges'] if e['relType']=='CHAIN_MEMBER']; print\(f'SupplyChain nodes: {len\(sc\)}'\); print\(f'FEEDS_INTO edges: {len\(fi\)}'\); print\(f'CHAIN_MEMBER edges: {len\(cm\)}'\); print\('Sample chains:', [n['label'] for n in sc[:5]]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('frontend/public/graph-data.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); sc=[n for n in d['nodes'] if n['nodeType']=='SupplyChain']; fi=[e for e in d['edges'] if e['relType']=='FEEDS_INTO']; cm=[e for e in d['edges'] if e['relType']=='CHAIN_MEMBER']; print\(f'SupplyChain nodes: {len\(sc\)}'\); print\(f'FEEDS_INTO edges: {len\(fi\)}'\); print\(f'CHAIN_MEMBER edges: {len\(cm\)}'\); print\('Chains:', [n['label'] for n in sc]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('frontend/public/graph-data.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); chains=[\(n['label'],len\([e for e in d['edges'] if e['relType']=='CHAIN_MEMBER' and e['source']==n['id']]\)\) for n in d['nodes'] if n['nodeType']=='SupplyChain']; [print\(f'{c[0]:35} {c[1]} stocks'\) for c in chains]")
